title: Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty and comforting beef stew with tender beef and vegetables in a rich broth.
instructions: Heat the butter in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and brown on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and carrot to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the broth to the pot, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the beef is tender, about 2 hours.
Add the potatoes to the pot and continue to simmer until they are tender, about 30 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
